name: blacksand-dashboard
description: BlackSand executive leasing dashboard — a standalone single-file HTML dashboard with an OPTIONAL lightweight Express host for local/LAN deployment. The standalone HTML is the reference implementation.

scripts.test: npm run test:seed && npm run test:api && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:production && npm run test:monday && npm run test:history
scripts.test:history: node --test tests/history/riyadh-date.test.js tests/history/migration.test.js tests/history/history-engine.test.js tests/history/cli.test.js tests/history/automation.test.js tests/history/history-api.test.js tests/history/corrections.test.js tests/history/analytics.test.js tests/history/analytics-api.test.js tests/history/tenant-analytics.test.js tests/history/correction-pass.test.js tests/history/phase9-3-api-integration.test.js
